title: FreshDesk SSL Handshake Error due to domain format
symptom: When using the FreshDesk node to get ticket details, an SSL handshake failure occurs. The error message indicates a problem with the SSL connection.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: The SSL handshake error occurs because FreshDesk rejects the connection when the domain format in the credentials is incorrect. It expects only the subdomain part, not the full domain.
fix_steps: Change the domain format from 'companyname.freshdesk.com' to 'companyname'
agent_instruction: Update the FreshDesk domain in the node settings to use only the subdomain.
